pdg_node.informal_desc: Executes the standalone APC computation as a pure stateless function of the input.

declaration.name: apccoreevaluation
declaration.docstring: Executes the standalone APC computation as a pure stateless function of the input.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Pure Single-Input Functional Mapping. Applies a fixed computational rule to one input object and returns the resulting object without reading or mutating external state. The transform is referentially transparent: identical inputs produce identical outputs, and execution has no side effects beyond value production.. Applications: Physics simulation kernels where one state vector is transformed into a computed diagnostic quantity, Bioinformatics sequence scoring where an encoded sequence is mapped to a scalar or structured compatibility score, Computer vision feature extraction where an image tensor is transformed into a latent representation, Control systems signal processing where an input waveform is mapped to a filtered or transformed output signal
